design_philosophy: Functional clarity, high-contrast, structured and distraction-free split-pane layout to support Agile estimation.

monospace.usage: Fibonacci numbers on cards, timers, data metrics

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. F-pattern priority. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
spacing_and_layout.global_layout: Split pane architecture for the main room. Fixed full-height left sidebar (w-80) and flex-1 scrollable right area.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Grid mode 'Control Room' for dashboards: Dense, data-correlated, tight gaps (gap-4/gap-6).
spacing_and_layout.cards: Subtle border, no drop shadow by default, hover lifts (-translate-y-1) and adds light shadow (shadow-md).

buttons.primary: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium shadow-sm data-testid='{name}-button'
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300 transition-colors px-6 py-2 rounded-md font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 px-4 py-2 rounded-md transition-colors

fibonacci_card.base: w-20 h-28 sm:w-24 sm:h-36 rounded-xl border-2 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-white shadow-sm hover:shadow-md

inputs.default: w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent data-testid='{name}-input'

table.container: w-full border-collapse bg-white rounded-lg border border-slate-200 overflow-hidden
table.header: bg-slate-50 border-b border-slate-200 text-left text-xs font-medium text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider px-6 py-3

motion.card_flip: Use framer-motion rotateY(180deg) for revealing cards. Add subtle scale/spring physics (type: 'spring', stiffness: 260, damping: 20).
motion.presence: Avatars should have a subtle pulsing ring (animate-pulse) when a user is actively voting.
motion.transitions: State changes (Ready -> Voting -> Completed) should crossfade content gracefully using framer-motion AnimatePresence.

images.description: Minimalist professional 3D abstract composition for landing page hero section.
Clean, bright, abstract professional pattern for a login page background.
Abstract blue metallic ring logo for the app.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='room-create-button', data-testid='story-title-input'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds must meet APCA/WCAG standards. Slate-600 on Slate-50 minimum.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: All buttons, inputs, and clickable cards must have explicit focus states: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react for all standard icons (coffee, check, clock, users, settings, plus, bar-chart, etc). Ensure strokeWidth is 2.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI primarily with pure Tailwind CSS and React for the unique split-pane layout.
Use Shadcn UI for standard forms, dialogs, dropdowns, and complex interactive bits.
Implement the split pane layout with Flexbox (w-80 left sidebar border-r, flex-1 right pane).
Ensure all state controls (Start, Reveal, Reset) are only visible/enabled based on PO role (simulate via state for MVP).
Fibonacci sequence to support: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21, ?, ∞, ☕. Render them cleanly.
Card animation must use framer-motion. Cards are face down (back pattern visible) until 'Reveal' is clicked, then they flip (rotateY 180).
MUST include 'data-testid' on ALL inputs, buttons, and cards for robust testing.
Use standard Tailwind font-mono (or IBM Plex Mono/JetBrains) for the numbers on the Fibonacci cards.
Data table for 'Vote Table' should be clean and clearly show average points calculated after reveal.
